name: Ishigaki Foods Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ishigaki Foods Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, imports, and sells food and beverages primarily in Japan. The company's products include barley tea, oolong tea, non-caffeine tea, beef jerky, burdock tea, and other food products. It also manufactures and sells dry ingredients for business use. Ishigaki Foods Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
